commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(phase-11): enterprise change management workflow

Phase 11 complete — 3 plans, 2 waves, 8/8 must-haves verified.

Backend (change_management.py):

- 14 API routes: CRUD, submit, approve, reject, transition, rollback, audit CSV
- Department lead auto-routing, race condition protection

Frontend (5 React screens):

- 6 email templates, WebSocket broadcasts on all transitions

fix(ci): make Core-X checkout conditional on GH_PAT secret

When GH_PAT is not configured, CI skips docgen and drift check
and just builds the committed docs. This unblocks CI immediately.

To enable full docgen verification in CI, add a GH_PAT secret
with Contents:read access to KBLLR/core-x.

commit.message:
Add web push meal logging notifications

- DB schema v5→v6: push_subscriptions table + notif_* columns on users
- APScheduler runs every minute, sends push if meal window has no entries
- notification_router: subscribe/unsubscribe/prefs endpoints + VAPID key endpoint
- Service worker: push and notificationclick handlers
- useNotifications hook: subscribe, unsubscribe, updatePrefs
- GoalSettingModal: 4th Alerts tab with toggle + per-meal time pickers
- DashboardPage: one-time dismissible "Enable meal reminders?" banner

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Push FUP reset instantly to node via webhook (no more 60s delay)

When admin resets FUP on the central platform, the node kept
fup_triggered=1 for up to 60s (until the next pull sync). If the
client reconnected during this window, they got FUP-reduced speed.

Now resetUserFup() pushes the reset instantly to the node via the
existing NodePushService webhook system (pppoe_user.fup_reset event).
The node's webhook.php applies fup_triggered=0 immediately, so the
client reconnects at normal speed. Pull sync is kept as fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add canonical fallback to index.html for non-JS crawlers

Ahrefs sees all SPA routes as identical (same index.html shell) with no
canonical when JS doesn't fire. Adding canonical fallback to index.html
prevents the "duplicate pages without canonical" flag. React Helmet
overrides this with the correct per-page canonical when JS renders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix ae-calendar-sync: use unipile_accounts DB table for user's email account

Instead of scanning all Unipile platform accounts by type (which was incorrect
for multi-user setups and returned no results), look up the user's specific
EMAIL account from the unipile_accounts table (provider='EMAIL', status='active').

This is the same pattern used by check-gmail-connection and send-email.
Now gives actionable error messages if:
- No Gmail/Outlook connected (→ Settings → Gmail)
- Calendar scopes not enabled in Unipile dashboard

commit.message:
Fix globe map annotations not rendering until screenshot

MapKit's .imagery (globe) map style doesn't render Annotation views
until a forced display update. Fix by switching to bound camera
position and nudging it +0.001 latitude after 0.5s delay, which
forces MapKit to re-layout annotations.

Applied to all map views: SessionBragSheetCard, ActivationShareCard,
ActivationMapView, SessionDetailView, and SessionMapPanelView.

commit.message:
Fix attn_bias not reaching backbone + CUDA tensor indexing safety

Bug 1: Apply σ-based confidence gating on fc_input in CSCI forward.
sigmoid(-attn_bias) modulates per-variable input strength without
changing backbone interface or in_dim.

Bug 2: Use .cpu() for advanced tensor indexing in forecast_head
and spectral_projector to avoid CUDA compatibility issues.

Also switch scripts to use tslib_env (PyTorch 2.4.1+cu121) which
supports GTX 1080 Ti (sm_61).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(client): prevent cards disappearing when played during trick collection (#111)

* fix(client): prevent cards from disappearing when played during trick collection

The trick collection animation used a useLayoutEffect cleanup function to
cancel the setCollecting(null) timer. When a card was played quickly after
trick collection (changing plays.length), React ran the cleanup, canceling
the timer — leaving collecting permanently stuck. This caused all cards in
the next trick to be invisible (hidden behind stale collecting state with
opacity: 0).

Fix: manage the collection timer via a ref instead of effect cleanup, and
immediately clear stale collecting state when new trick cards arrive.

Also disable hand card interaction during the 400ms collection animation
so the local player can't trigger the race condition themselves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(client): pass explicit initial value to useRef for strict TypeScript

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Claude/compassionate lamport (#34)

* fix: route paste events to overlay input fields

tea.PasteMsg was always dispatched to handleBracketedPaste(), which
inserts into the document body. When the Open From Gist or Share To
Gist overlay was active, pasted text went behind the overlay instead
of into the input field. Now PasteMsg is routed based on the current
mode: StateOpenFrom appends to openFromInput, StateShareTo (description
field) appends to shareDescription.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add `cm remote` subcommand for opening remote documents

New `cm remote` command with two backends:
- `--gist <id-or-url>`: opens GitHub Gists via gh CLI (supports any
  identifier that `gh gist view` accepts, including other users' gists)
- `--http <url>`: fetches public URLs via HTTP GET with paranoid security:
  scheme validation (http/https only), 1MB size limit via io.LimitReader,
  binary content rejection via filecheck.ValidateContent, redirect scheme
  validation, and layered timeouts (30s total, 15s headers, 10s TLS)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: simplify remote command — drop unused filename return, fix error wrapping

- Remove filename return value from fetchURL() and fetchGist() (YAGNI)
- Use %w verb in fetchGist error wrapping to preserve original errors
- Remove unused path and time imports
- Clean up test assertions to match simplified signatures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add plan for remote open and paste fix feature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add cm remote --http to example Try It sections

Every example page now shows a one-liner that opens the file directly
from GitHub, no clone required. Also adds compound solution doc for
the TUI paste-in-overlay bug fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: use repo-raw-url shortcode instead of hardcoded GitHub URLs

New Hugo shortcode derives the raw.githubusercontent.com URL from
site.Params.githubURL and githubBranch — if the repo moves or the
branch changes, all example pages update automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add copy-to-clipboard button on all repo-file links

Every {{< repo-file >}} shortcode now renders an inline copy icon that
copies `cm remote --http <raw-url>` to the clipboard. Readers can
paste the command directly into a terminal — no clone required.

- Enhanced repo-file shortcode with SVG copy button and data-cmd attr
- Added .repo-file-copy CSS (matches site design tokens)
- Added clipboard JS handler with checkmark feedback
- Removed redundant cm remote --http lines from Try It code blocks
- Deleted repo-raw-url shortcode (superseded by copy button)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: rewrite recipe-scaling example with real units and quantities

Replace the generic bread recipe (bare unitless numbers, awkward variable
names like original_flour_g / scaled_flour_g) with a real English scones
recipe using CalcMark quantities: 280 grams, 160 ml, 4 teaspoons, 220
celsius. Showcases `in` unit conversion (grams→ounces, ml→cups,
celsius→fahrenheit), automatic display scaling (1120 grams→1.12 kg),
and currency arithmetic. Cuts 8 bloated sections to 5 focused ones.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: brainstorm convert_to and scale frontmatter directives

Document-level unit conversion (convert_to: si/imperial) and quantity
scaling (scale: 4) via frontmatter, with optional _categories filters
to whitelist which unit types participate. Rates are immune to scale
but participate in convert_to. Currency is untouched by both.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: use unit_categories as sub-value of scale and convert_to

Collapse four top-level keys into two directives with scalar/map forms.
Simple: `scale: 4`. With filtering: `scale: { factor: 4, unit_categories: [Mass, Volume] }`.
Same pattern for convert_to. Shared unit_categories key name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: resolve all open questions in convert_to/scale brainstorm

Imperial maps to unit family (auto-scaling picks readable unit), explicit
`in` overrides convert_to, scale is purely implicit (no variable), compound
units are atomic categories, arbitrary units participate in scale by default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
